spec.query:
from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "lux")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "ruido")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "gas")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "lux")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "ruido")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "gas")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "temperatura")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hum")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "humedad")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hum")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

spec.title: COMPARATIVA ENTRE LUMINOSIDAD Y DB RELATIVOS

spec.query:
from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "lux")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Luminosidad")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "ruido")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Ruido")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pres")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "estacion_sensores")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lecturas_esp32")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp")
  |> yield(name: "mean")
